## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Growth X and Brand.ai on content strategy and AI-powered content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X provides AI-powered content generation services with a focus on content strategy, workflow adaptation, and expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Brand.ai is an AI platform for brand management and content creation tailored to brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Both companies see potential for partnership or Growth X becoming an early customer of Brand.ai's self-serve platform](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Next steps are for Growth X to provide a proposal/roadmap for Brand.ai's content needs and further exploration of collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)

## Topics

### Growth X Background and Services

  - [Marcel previously led marketing/content teams at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, Scale AI, DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Founded Growth X to apply AI workflows to content generation while maintaining human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Provides content strategy, AI workflow adaptation, dedicated editing, and end-to-end execution](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Seeing strong results for clients with hockey-stick traffic growth from AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Brand.ai Background

  - [Founded by Michael Carter and team \~1.5 years ago to explore brand management use cases for AI](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Recently acquired brand.ai domain which is driving significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Building platform to generate on-brand content and check creative against brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Enterprise clients like YouTube, Lyft, Delta, Walmart using "brand check" workflow](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Mid-market/startup clients using for content generation across channels](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Growth X could leverage Brand.ai's platform for more advanced brand adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Brand.ai could utilize Growth X's content strategy and execution capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Growth X interested in piloting Brand.ai's self-serve offering when available](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Opportunities for programmatic content generation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Growth X to send proposal/roadmap for Brand.ai's content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
  - [Explore programmatic, large-scale content generation opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [Discuss potential partnership or Growth X as early Brand.ai customer](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
  - [Connect on Slack channel for ongoing collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/3mDJTfgMa2AKnzP-4yZdRRzj3mHQifyN?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)
